vision: Lead the global transformation to an AI-first era, empowering enterprises, developers, and users with responsible and impactful AI.

okrs.title: Establish Google Cloud as the undisputed leader in Enterprise AI adoption, driving significant market share growth.

key_results.title: Grow Google Cloud's AI-powered product revenue by 60% year-over-year, exceeding market growth rates.
Secure 75 new strategic enterprise customer wins for Vertex AI platform and industry-specific AI solutions.
Achieve top-quartile analyst rankings for Google Cloud's AI portfolio in at least 3 major industry reports.

okrs.title: Revolutionize developer productivity and innovation through deep AI integration across Google Cloud's developer platforms.

key_results.title: Increase the number of active developers using AI features within Google Cloud tools (e.g., Cloud Code AI, Gemini in BigQuery) by 500,000.
Reduce the average development cycle time for AI-powered applications on Google Cloud by 25%, as measured by customer surveys.
Launch 3 new highly-differentiated AI-powered developer products or services on Google Cloud, each achieving 10,000+ monthly active users within 6 months of launch.

okrs.title: Ensure Google's AI development and deployment consistently adheres to and advances Responsible AI principles, building global trust.

key_results.title: Integrate comprehensive Responsible AI evaluations and fairness testing into the launch process for all 10+ major AI model updates and product releases.
Reduce critical AI safety and bias incidents reported across Google's top 20 AI products by 40% year-over-year.
Publish 5 leading research papers and release 2 open-source toolkits advancing the state-of-the-art in AI interpretability, privacy, or fairness.

okrs.title: Pioneer foundational AI breakthroughs, pushing the boundaries of what's possible and securing Google's long-term leadership.

key_results.title: Demonstrate a novel AI architecture that achieves a 2x improvement in training efficiency on key benchmark tasks compared to 2025 models.
Develop and validate a prototype for a new generation of AI-specific hardware, showing a 5x improvement in performance-per-watt for generative AI workloads.
Publish a seminal paper or achieve a significant milestone in quantum algorithm development with clear implications for future AI acceleration.
